visual_summary: This component is a music player interface, typically used when creating applications with a focus on media and soundtracks. It consists of a card with a header displaying the current song, a progress bar-like layout featuring colorful animation, and buttons for playback control. A developer would use this when needing a visually appealing and functional music player within their application.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: Border Beam Demo
Description: This component is a music player interface, typically used when creating applications with a focus on media and soundtracks. It consists of a card with a header displaying the current song, a progress bar-like layout featuring colorful animation, and buttons for playback control. A developer would use this when needing a visually appealing and functional music player within their application.
Style: minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: animated, hover, clickable
Tags: music-player, animation, progress-bar, ui-control, card

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
